MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MUKEMMEL T. SARIMSAKCI'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.
APPEARANCES: Robert D. Resner, Esq. 482-9500 for pltf & opposing party; Stanley Dale Radtke, Esq. of Law Offices of Haitham Edward Ballout 650/373-1122 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling and adopted as follows: If an amended complaint is not on file by 10/30/08, then as of 10/31/08 defendant is entitled to judgment on the pleadings. (302/HEK) JUDGE HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

Appearance:
Robert D. Resner, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.
